mapper.select:
WITH ranked_qualifications AS ( select t1.hr_id, t2.user_id , case when t1.hr_type = '0001' then '내부심사원' when t1.hr_type = '0002' then '내부심사팀장' else '' end || ' - ' || t2.hr_nm || '(' || t3.orgn_nm || ')' as hrNm, row_number() over (partition by t1.hr_id order by t1.hr_type desc) as row_num from esg.tb_qualification_certification t1 left join esg.tb_hr_info t2 on t1.hr_id = t2.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info t3 on t3.orgn_id = t2.orgn_id
where t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t1.comp_id = #{compId} and t1.pass_yn = 'Y' ) select hr_id, hrNm, user_id from ranked_qualifications where row_num = 1 order by hr_id;
mapper.insert:
select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docNo from esg.tb_audit_execution_plan where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType}
insert into esg.tb_audit_execution_plan ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, write_dt, audit_nm, audit_div, audit_purpose_scope, audit_request, distribute, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{writeDt}, #{auditNm}, #{auditDiv}, #{auditPurposeScope}, #{auditRequest}, #{distribute}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

select LPAD((coalesce(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::text, 5, '0') as docSeq from esg.tb_audit_execution_plan_detail where write_year = #{writeYear} and doc_type = #{docType} and doc_no = #{docNo}
insert into esg.tb_audit_execution_plan_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, audit_dt, audit_st_time, audit_ed_time, orgn_id, audit_content, remark, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{auditDt}, REPLACE(#{auditStTime}, ':', ''), REPLACE(#{auditEdTime}, ':', ''), #{orgnId}, #{auditContent}, #{remark}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

insert into esg.tb_audit_execution_plan_detail_hr ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) values ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{hrId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
